person.name: Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain

nameForms.fullText: Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain

zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain於1175年之前與Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain在威爾士結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain于1175年之前与Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain在威尔士结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Iorwerth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from iōr‘ ‘lord’ + a mutated form of berth ‘handsome’; borne in the Mabinogi by the jealous brother of Madawg , son of Maredudd . Iorwerth came to be regarded as a Welsh equivalent of Edward , but it has no actual connection with that name.

variants.name: Yorath
meanings: Anglicized form of   Iorwerth   or, in some cases, a transferred use of the surname derived from it.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain married Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain before 1175, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain a épousé Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain avant 1175, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain hat vor 1175 in Wales Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain lei sposato Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain prima del 1175, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowainは1175年以前にウェールズでIorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain(은)는 1175년 이전 웨일스에서 Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain casou-se com Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain antes 1175, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain вышла замуж за человека по имени Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain перед 1175 г. в местности Уэльс. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain se casó con Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain antes de 1175, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
